attr.title: LocalSend Retro
attr.desc: A LocalSend-protocol file-transfer client: push ROMs from your phone or PC to the device and pull saves or screenshots back over wifi — no cable, no SSH. Compatible with the official LocalSend apps. Gamepad-first UI: a radar of nearby devices, accept/decline dialogs with progress, a file browser for sending, and an on-screen keyboard for settings.
attr.inst: Ready to run. Install LocalSend on your phone or PC (localsend.org), connect both devices to the same wifi, and they will find each other. Works with the official app's default settings; transfers are encrypted.
